final_prompt.prompt:
Generate an editorial photo for a Weibo news/trending post, city skyline at dusk.

Style/medium: photojournalistic documentary style, shot on mobile phone, sharp details
Composition: wide horizontal frame, 16:9, skyline as main subject with room for text overlay
Subject: city skyline at dusk, pedestrians hurrying, tall buildings reflecting sunset glow, neon lights gradually lighting up
Scene/backdrop: urban dusk, golden hour transitioning to neon night, distant skyscrapers with sunset reflections
Lighting/mood: dramatic light-shadow contrast, warm sunset glow mixed with emerging neon, strong sense of real on-site presence
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): "城市里的安静时刻" / "黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙" / "@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察"
Constraints: text "城市里的安静时刻" in prominent position using bold or modern typeface; "黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙" as subtitle; "@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察" as watermark at bottom-right; sufficient negative space for text
Avoid:
